modules.name: Day 1: Modern Java Workflows & Test-Driven Development
modules.description: Greenfield development and TDD workflows using AI-assisted coding in a simulated Scrum environment. Build a Spring Boot microservice with >80% test coverage.

lessons.title: Module 1: The Visa Scrum Simulation
topics: AI Lab: ChatGPT-generated flowcharts and pseudocode
Validating AI logic against business rules

lessons.title: Module 2: AI-Driven Boilerplate & Dependency Injection
topics: Spot the Hallucination: reviewing AI-generated DI for security flaws

modules.name: Day 2: Legacy Systems, Debugging, and Hybrid Development
modules.description: Hybrid development with legacy systems — reading complex code, debugging integration failures, refactoring safely, and surviving simulated production load.

lessons.title: Module 5: Reading Complex Code
topics: Hybrid Development scenario: inherit a Legacy Payment Processor (Monolith)
AI tools to explain classes and map dependencies
Architecture diagrams and change log review

lessons.title: Module 6: The Booby Trap Simulation
topics: Integrating Day 1 microservice into Legacy System
AI-assisted debugging: stack trace analysis and integration fix

lessons.title: Module 7: Refactoring with AI
topics: Improving code quality without altering behavior
GitHub Copilot refactoring (nested loops to Java Streams)

assessment.title: Production Simulation Deliverables
items: Day 1: Passing build of a new Spring Boot microservice with >80% code coverage
Day 2: Successful integration of microservice into legacy system without breaking regression tests
Final Pull Request passing load/chaos testing
Scrum team retrospective on AI-assisted development
